items.title: [CUIABÁ] - Web Developer na BITLINE
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Irá realizar desenvolvimento e análise com a linguagem PHP e banco de dados mySQL. 
Conhecimentos em HTML5, CSS, layouts responsivos e desenvolvimento de App são diferenciais.

## Local

Cuiabá - MT

## Benefícios

- Ajuda de Custo (alimentação/Refeição)
- Plano de Saúde (apos período de experiencia)
- Plano Odontológico (apos período de experiencia)
- Treinamento e capacitação

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- PHP
- MySQL
- Javascript
- Bootstrap
- jQuery

**Diferenciais:**
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Design Responsivo
- Desenvolvimento de App

## Contratação

Regime de contratação: Efetivo - CLT

## Como se candidatar

Enviar currículos no e-mail: leo@bitline.com.br

items.title: [CUIABÁ] - Desenvolvedor (Front-End, Back-End ou Mobile) na NUVEM
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Estamos sempre em busca de profissionais interessados em desenvolver soluções inovadoras utilizando a tecnologia .NET e que além da competência técnica, tenham foco e pró-atividade.

## Local

Nuvem
Rua Presidente Marques, nº 400, Quilombo
Cuiabá/MT - 78045-175

## Benefícios

Salário compatível com o nível de conhecimento.
Ambiente de trabalho descontraído.
Lounge para alimentação, descompressão, relax e lazer na empresa.
Estacionamento
Você pode trabalhar de bermuda ;)

## Requisitos

Ser apto a trabalhar em um ambiente descontraído.
Ser apaixonado por desenvolvimento de software.
Ser capaz de resolver problemas de forma rápida e criativa.
Ser capaz de encontrar ferramentas para resolver os desafios que surgem diariamente.
Ser capaz de analisar problemas em equipe e propor soluções, usando bons argumentos.

**Requisitos Técnicos**
Git
SQL 

**Diferenciais Front-end:**
Javascript
React
Redux
CSS/SASS
Testes automatizados

**Diferenciais Back-end:**
ASP.NET/ASP.NET Core
ASP.NET Identity
Identity Server
Familiar com Azure e AWS
Testes automatizados

**Diferenciais Mobile:**
iOS
Android
Xamarin Forms
React Native

## Como se candidatar

Site Nuvem: http://carreiras.nuvem.net/o/desenvolvedor-frontend-backend-ou-mobile

items.title: 【Takuma不上班】徵 Android Developer
items.description:
## 公司簡介

Takuma 不上班是一間支持大家不上班的沒錢公司，201X 被慫恿拉出來巴拉巴拉......

## 技術介紹

擁有一群超越 Android 94 狂的高手，除了 Android 以外還有一堆連 iOS 、JavaScript 巴拉巴拉都會 der

## 工作內容

不上班啊！不上班啊！！不上班啊啊啊！！！（崩潰）

## 能力需求

會用 Android 不上班！

## 薪資範圍

無論是 Junior 還是 Senior 還是大神都是 0 元薪資喔！！！

## 工時/特休

都不上班了當然沒工時啊！廢話！

## 福利制度

就是不上班啦！

## 工作地點

家裡。

## 申請方式

請向現在公司遞出辭呈！

## 面試流程

吃飯睡覺打 API

## 聯絡方式

有任何疑問歡迎在下面 Comment 留下你的負能量！

items.title: GoFull Inc - Backend Developer (PHP)
items.description:
## Description

GoFull Inc. is looking for an experienced Backend Developer (PHP) to join our team. If you have excellent programming skills and a passion for developing applications or improving existing ones, we would like to meet you.

As GoFull's Backend Developer, you’ll work closely with our engineers to ensure system consistency and improve user experience.

Ultimately, you should be able to develop and maintain functional and stable web applications to meet our company’s needs.

## Responsibilities

- Participate in the entire application lifecycle, focusing on coding and debugging
- Write clean code to develop functional web applications
- Troubleshoot and debug applications
- Perform UI tests to optimize performance
- Manage cutting-edge technologies to improve legacy applications
- Collaborate with Front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements with server side logic
- Gather and address technical and design requirements
- Provide training and support to internal teams
- Build reusable code and libraries for future use
- Liaise with developers, designers and system administrators to identify new features
- Follow emerging technologies

## Requirements

- Proven work experience as a Backend Developer
- In-depth understanding of the entire web development process (design, development and deployment)
- Hands on experience with PHP and other programming languages like Java, Ruby and Python
- Working knowledge of CMS framework
- Familiarity with front-end languages (e.g. HTML, JavaScript and CSS)
- Excellent analytical and time management skills
- Teamwork skills with a problem-solving attitude
- BSc degree in Computer Science or relevant field

## Skills

- PHP
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

## Apply

https://gofull-inc.workable.com/jobs/383267

## People

[Pak H. Chau](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pakhchau) - Founder/CEO

items.title: 8 Bit Rockstars - Senior Front End Developer - Saigon - FT
items.description:
![8BR](http://8bitrockr.com/img/logo_w.png)
#8 BIT ROCKSTARS

Floor 8th, Vincom B, 72 Le Thanh Ton, Ben Nghe Ward, Dist.1, HCMC
http://8bitrockr.com/
hr@8bitrockr.com
#### Salary: Up to 2.000 USD /month

Email CV to: **_hr@8bitrockr.com_**
## Salary

_Up to 2000 USD/month_
## Job Description

We are looking for people who can work well independently and love to be part of a team. 

You will be working with international clients on very interesting products. This is not the standard corporate website job but high load, complex projects which require dedication, skill and that you put your heart into the job. This is an excellent opportunity to gain experience, deliver happiness, and push your technical boundaries.
## Requirement
- Positive attitude, responsible and ability to learn.
- Strong English skills
- **4+ year experience in front-end technologies**
- **Proficient at Javascript library and framework (React / Angular / Ember / Backbone, or jQuery)**
- Excellent at HTML5, CSS3 (with LESS/SASS and frameworks like Bootstrap)
- Knowledgeable of cross-browser compatibility issues and solutions
- Experience with Git
- Strong teamwork, good leadership skills and attention to details
- Understanding of continuous integration, SCRUM
### Big Plus
- Good understanding of SEO principles
- Coding conventions
- CMS (Drupal / Wordpress)
- Restful APIs
## Benefits:
### What We Can Offer
- Oportunity to grow and learn from other talented individuals. 
- Opportunities to work with International Experts and cool startup entrepreneurs
- Work as a member in fun, fast-paced, and friendly team
- Very fun and friendly colleagues, global and professional working environment
- Modern office in District 1 with entertainment zone, relax area, coffee bar, etc.
### Benefits include:
- Open and honest culture where people are valued, treated fairly, trusted and empowered to do great things
- Attractive, **competitive salary** and incentives
- Year end **bonus** (13th month salary ++)
- 40 hour work weeks (9:00-18:00, Mon-Fri)
- **15 days** of vacation per year
- **Probation** with **100% of salary**
- Performance and **salary review** every **6 months**
- **International Medical Insurance** will be paid by the company
- **English Class** with foreigner 3 times a week.
- New **Technologies Club** every week
- Quarterly **rockstar Hackathon** with the Best prizes
- Short and long-term **international training** / work
- **Company trip** (local or internationally) every year
- **Team building events**, party monthly and much more
- **Entertainment Zone** for all members with full media in company (game, music, TV…).
- Enjoy **Relax and Coffee Bar** in company.

Send us your CV at: **_hr@8bitrockr.com_** and we will call you ASAP!

items.title: OneSky - FE / BE / Data / Service Engineer - Quarry Bay
items.description:
[OneSky](oneskyapp.com) is looking for passionate Engineers to join our team. We use event-driven and micro-services architectures with different technology stacks. We do continuous integration with high levels of automated test coverage and deploy multiple times per day. We pick the right stack for each individual application so you would work in other new stacks as long as you can pick them up quickly. We are happy to share knowledge as well as lessons learned around the team, and keen on keeping our code readable, testable and easy to maintain.
## Responsibilities and Requirements:

Please refer to details at angel list
- [Application Developement - Front End / Backend](https://angel.co/onesky-1/jobs/121990-app-dev-engineer-frontend-backend)
- [Data Engineer](https://angel.co/onesky-1/jobs/121999-data-engineer)
- [DevOps / Service Engineer](https://angel.co/onesky-1/jobs/122001-devops-service-engineer)
## About OneSky

OneSky (http://www.oneskyapp.com) is a fast-growing provider of translation and localization services for apps, websites and games. We help companies expand globally through a comprehensive translation management platform and a network of professional translators.

We are building a different kind of software company: one that listens to client's needs, values innovation and solves customer problems with brilliant simplicity. If you work at OneSky, you'll have a direct impact on a product that helps thousands of companies to reach millions of global users every day! We hire great people and then trust them to be great.
## Location

Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
Note - For Front End development we are open for remote / freelance
## Contacts

Please apply on angellist or email careers@oneskyapp.com

items.title: First Meta - Front-End Developer - Saigon - FT
items.description:
Come join the Crypto-currency and Blockchain Revolution!!!

Looking to make a positive dent in the world? Are you passionate about cutting-edge crypto-currency and blockchain technology? Do you thrive in a startup environment? 

If so, FIRST META WANTS YOU!!
First Meta is a leading virtual game currency exchange since 2009. We are now busy building our next product based on crypto-currency and blockchain technology and are looking for a Front-End Engineer to join us. 
## If this sounds like you, please send us your CV
- You can distill complicated problems into simple and elegant solutions. 
- Be a strong software engineer. 
- Prefer real work to fake or political work. 
- Expertise in Javascript, ES6, HTML, CSS, JSON, HTTP Rest. 
- **Familiar with JS frameworks such as React.js, Angular, Backbone, Ember, etc. etc. etc.**
- Familiar with CSS preprocessors such as SASS, Stylus, Less, etc. 
- Familiar with build pipelines such as Gulp, Grunt, Webpack, etc. 
- **Expertise in React.js preferred.**
- **Experienced in UI/UX design is a big plus.**
- Passionate about web development. 
- You work well with teams. 
- You thrive in an startup environment. 
- You read everything and will paste an html peace character somewhere in your application. 
- Please include a link to your portfolio. 
## Salary
- $900 - $1300/month
## Location
- Saigon, Vietnam
### Contact

Please send your CV to jointheteam@firstmeta.com.

items.title: MySQUAR - Senior NodeJS/PGSQL - HCMC - FT
items.description:
## Location
- Saigon, Vietnam (394 Vo Van Kiet, D1, HCMC)
## Salary Expectation (A.k.a. Perks)
- Love from the team
- A competitive salary (baseline of 1000$ for mid-range)
- Full health benefits and social insurance
- A training budget
- A macbook and a 21" screen
- ESOP
- Possible travel to Myanmar to meet users and the team as well as Singapore
- Lots of cool stuff to relax (who said Foosball?)
## Requirements
- Mid-level to Senior Position
- Ability to grow, learn, challenge and be challenged 
- NodeJS
- PostgreSQL
- Knowledge of Graph and OrientDB is a plus
- A lot of passion and a good mind
## Skills
### Must Have
- Rock solid NodeJS skills
- PGSQL
- Know your s\* about patterns, scalable code, debugging, optimization, etc...
### We need you to

Work on a highly scalable backend, own your code, work in team and produce the best code you're ever written (yet). 
### You can bring
- Attention to details, quality and user-centric work
- Good attitude
- Passion
### Contact

Nicolas Embleton: nico@mysquar.com
Or apply at http://vietnam.mysquar.com
